reviews.comment:
Siempre q viajamos paramos en esa estación de servicio.
La limpieza de los sanitarios es impresionante.
Podes quedarte a comer en el comedor o comprar comida para llevarte

(Translated by Google)
Whenever we travel, we stop at that gas station.
The cleanliness of the restrooms is impressive. You can eat in the dining area or buy food to go.

reviews.comment:
Para mi sorpresa estaba bastante desprolijo y sucio. Los cestos llenos de vasura y los baños con poca limpieza.

(Translated by Google)
To my surprise, it was quite messy and dirty. The trash cans were full of trash and the bathrooms were poorly cleaned.
